# Ricky Zheng

## Who is Ricky Zheng?

Ricky Zheng is a Data Engineer Lead and CTO of a health AI company, based in Sydney, Australia.
He moved from China to Australia and has a background in solar engineering before transitioning
into data engineering and artificial intelligence.

## Current Roles

- **Data Engineer Lead** at a real estate advertising company — building large-scale data pipelines
  and analytics infrastructure
- **CTO** at a health AI company — leading product and engineering to apply AI in healthcare

## Expertise

- Data Engineering (pipelines, warehousing, orchestration, streaming)
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- Health AI / AI in Healthcare
- Solar Engineering & Renewable Energy
- Electronics & Hardware (3D printing, embedded systems)
- Product Development & Engineering Leadership

## Background

- Originally from China; moved to Australia
- Holds experience in solar engineering before pivoting to data and AI
- Based in Sydney, New South Wales, Australia

## Interests

- Artificial Intelligence and its real-world applications
- 3D printing and hardware prototyping
- Electronics and embedded systems
- Solar energy and renewable technologies
- Space exploration and astronomy

## Contact

- Email: hi@ricky-zheng.com
- Website: https://ricky-zheng.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ricky-zheng-au/
- GitHub: https://github.com/HelloRicky

## Website

This site (ricky-zheng.com) is Ricky's personal portfolio, showcasing his journey from solar
engineering to data engineering and AI leadership. It highlights his career, projects, and
passion for building products that matter.
